title: 10 Pack Dot Tablecloths Table Covers Disposable Tablecloth Wipeable Plastic Tablecloth Waterproof Party Tablecloths for Indoor or Outdoor Parties Birthdays Weddings Christmas Gold(137*274 cm)
features: Confetti dots design: Our tablecloth features rose gold dots that are printed on the white background, which distribute on the both side of the tablecloth; the exquisite and shiny design can enhance the aesthetic appeal of your table and add luster to your party and impress your guests,which bring a pleasant atmosphere to your parties
Party decor package: Each package include 10 pcs Rose Gold Dots tablecloths, which measures 137*274 cm.

Ideal Size: Versatile shaped tablecloth fits most buffet tables, outdoor picnic tables, cafe table, dining room and kitchen tables.after the party, simply roll it up and clean the table, very easy to use,
Easy to maintain: Just wipe gently with a paper towel or damp cloth to easily remove oil stains. To keep the tablecloth waterproof, do not machine wash, bleach or iron.

Delicate party supplies: these dot tablecloths cloths are suitable for most events, including parties, weddings, birthday parties, barbecues, Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, dinners, picnics and many other theme events; you can hang them on the wall as decorative background
description: Product description 10 Pack Dot Tablecloths Table Covers Disposable Tablecloth Wipeable PVC Tablecloth Waterproof Party Tablecloths for Indoor or Outdoor Parties Birthdays Weddings Christmas Gold(137*274 cm) Safety Warning Do not machine wash, bleach, or iron. Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Wipe clean with a damp cloth only.
